content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Meridian Health Systems
Customer ID: C001
Contract ID: K001
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Call Type: Onboarding Check-in
Date: May 15, 2023
Participants: Sarah Chen (AE), Dr. Linda Forsythe (Director of Clinical Operations), Kevin Marsh (IT Coordinator)

Sarah Chen: Thanks for making time, Linda, Kevin. We're about two and a half months in — I wanted to check in on how the rollout is going.

Dr. Forsythe: Honestly, better than I expected. The clinical operations team has taken to it well. We've got about 22 of the 30 users actively logging in, which for a new tool rollout in healthcare is pretty good.

Sarah Chen: That's great to hear. Kevin, anything on the IT side worth flagging?

Kevin Marsh: The SSO integration took a bit longer than we planned — we had some issues with our identity provider configuration. But we worked through it with your support team and it's been stable for about three weeks now.

Sarah Chen: Good to hear that got resolved. Linda, any feedback from the clinical team on the dashboard builder?

Dr. Forsythe: They love the self-serve aspect. Before this, every report request went through IT, which meant a two-week wait. Now the team leads are building their own views. That's been a real shift. The one thing I'd flag is the export to PDF functionality — a couple of the reports don't render cleanly when exported. It's not a blocker but it's come up a few times.

Sarah Chen: I'll log that with our product team and follow up with a timeline. Anything else on your radar before the six-month mark?

Dr. Forsythe: We have a third facility coming online in early 2024. I'm going to want to talk about adding users ahead of that. Probably 10 to 12 more.

Sarah Chen: Absolutely, let's plan for that conversation in Q4. I'll put something in the calendar for October.
